# Lifebridge Medical Center — llms.txt
# AI/LLM Crawler Information
# Last updated: 2025-01-15

## Site Overview
Lifebridge Medical Center is a premier multi-specialty hospital located in New Delhi, India.
Website: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/
Type: Hospital / Healthcare Provider / Medical Organization

## Key Information
- Name: Lifebridge Medical Center
- Tagline: Your Health, Our Priority
- Location: 123 Healthcare Avenue, Medical District, New Delhi 110001, India
- Phone: +91-9876543210
- Emergency: 108
- Email: info@lifebridgemedical.com

## Services & Departments
- Cardiology (Heart & Cardiovascular Care)
- Neurology (Brain & Nervous System)
- Orthopedics (Bone & Joint Care)
- Pediatrics (Child Healthcare)
- Oncology (Cancer Treatment)
- Dermatology (Skin Care)
- Gynecology (Women's Health)
- Ophthalmology (Eye Care)
- ENT (Ear, Nose & Throat)
- Pulmonology (Lung & Respiratory)
- Gastroenterology (Digestive Health)
- Urology (Urinary System)
- General Medicine
- Emergency Medicine (24/7 ER)
- Radiology & Diagnostics

## Pages Available
- Home: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/
- About Us: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/about
- Departments: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/departments
- Doctors: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/doctors
- Services & Treatments: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/services
- Patient Services: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/patient-services
- Book Appointment: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/book-appointment
- Blog & Health Articles: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/blog
- Announcements: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/announcements
- Contact Us: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/contact
- Emergency: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/emergency
- FAQs: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/faqs
- Symptom Checker (AI): https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/symptom-checker
- Privacy Policy: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/terms

## Features
- AI-powered Symptom Checker
- AI Chat Support Widget
- Online Appointment Booking
- 24/7 Emergency Services
- Patient Portal
- Health Blog & Resources
- Interactive Department Finder
- Doctor Directory with Filtering

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: React 18, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS 3, Framer Motion
- UI: Headless UI, Lucide React Icons
- Hosting: Vercel
- Domain: hms.gu-saurabh.site

## Contact for AI/Bot Inquiries
- Developer: Saurabh
- Portfolio: https://gu-saurabh.site
- Email: info@lifebridgemedical.com

## Crawling Guidance
- Respect robots.txt directives
- Sitemap: https://hms.gu-saurabh.site/sitemap.xml
- This is a Single Page Application (SPA) — content is rendered client-side
- API endpoints (/api/*) should not be crawled
